# The v2 Optics runtime uses opencv-python for slmsuite oracle paths.
# Host libGL.so.1 is required, for example from the Debian/Ubuntu libgl1 package.

scipy>=1.10
matplotlib>=3.7
numba>=0.57
scikit-learn>=1.3
pandas>=1.5
psutil>=5.9

slmsuite>=0.3.0
ortools>=9.9,<9.11

torch>=2.2
torchoptics>=0.3.0

aotools>=1.0
OptiCommPy>=0.9
diffractio>=0.2.4

opencv-python>=4.10,<4.12
